title: festuca olgae
intro: Festuca olgae, also known as Olgas fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Festuca olgae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and improve respiratory problems. Festuca olgae can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
